     9	
    10	# Vercel React Best Practices
    11	
    12	Comprehensive performance optimization guide for React and Next.js applications, maintained by Vercel. Contains 57 rules across 8 categories, prioritized by impact to guide automated refactoring and code generation.
    13	
    14	## When to Apply
    15	
    16	Reference these guidelines when:
    17	- Writing new React components or Next.js pages
    18	- Implementing data fetching (client or server-side)
    19	- Reviewing code for performance issues
    20	- Refactoring existing React/Next.js code
    21	- Optimizing bundle size or load times
    22	
    23	## Rule Categories by Priority
    24	
    25	| Priority | Category | Impact | Prefix |
    26	|----------|----------|--------|--------|
    27	| 1 | Eliminating Waterfalls | CRITICAL | `async-` |
    28	| 2 | Bundle Size Optimization | CRITICAL | `bundle-` |
    29	| 3 | Server-Side Performance | HIGH | `server-` |
    30	| 4 | Client-Side Data Fetching | MEDIUM-HIGH | `client-` |
    31	| 5 | Re-render Optimization | MEDIUM | `rerender-` |
    32	| 6 | Rendering Performance | MEDIUM | `rendering-` |
    33	| 7 | JavaScript Performance | LOW-MEDIUM | `js-` |
    34	| 8 | Advanced Patterns | LOW | `advanced-` |
    35	
    36	## Quick Reference
    37	
    38	### 1. Eliminating Waterfalls (CRITICAL)
    39	
    40	- `async-defer-await` - Move await into branches where actually used
    41	- `async-parallel` - Use Promise.all() for independent operations
    42	- `async-dependencies` - Use better-all for partial dependencies
    43	- `async-api-routes` - Start promises early, await late in API routes
    44	- `async-suspense-boundaries` - Use Suspense to stream content
    45	
    46	### 2. Bundle Size Optimization (CRITICAL)
    47	
    48	- `bundle-barrel-imports` - Import directly, avoid barrel files
    49	- `bundle-dynamic-imports` - Use next/dynamic for heavy components
    50	- `bundle-defer-third-party` - Load analytics/logging after hydration
    51	- `bundle-conditional` - Load modules only when feature is activated
    52	- `bundle-preload` - Preload on hover/focus for perceived speed
    53	
    54	### 3. Server-Side Performance (HIGH)
    55	
    56	- `server-auth-actions` - Authenticate server actions like API routes
    57	- `server-cache-react` - Use React.cache() for per-request deduplication
    58	- `server-cache-lru` - Use LRU cache for cross-request caching
    59	- `server-dedup-props` - Avoid duplicate serialization in RSC props
    60	- `server-serialization` - Minimize data passed to client components
    61	- `server-parallel-fetching` - Restructure components to parallelize fetches
    62	- `server-after-nonblocking` - Use after() for non-blocking operations
    63	
    64	### 4. Client-Side Data Fetching (MEDIUM-HIGH)
    65	
    66	- `client-swr-dedup` - Use SWR for automatic request deduplication
    67	- `client-event-listeners` - Deduplicate global event listeners
    68	- `client-passive-event-listeners` - Use passive listeners for scroll
    69	- `client-localstorage-schema` - Version and minimize localStorage data
    70	
    71	### 5. Re-render Optimization (MEDIUM)
    72	
    73	- `rerender-defer-reads` - Don't subscribe to state only used in callbacks
    74	- `rerender-memo` - Extract expensive work into memoized components
    75	- `rerender-memo-with-default-value` - Hoist default non-primitive props
    76	- `rerender-dependencies` - Use primitive dependencies in effects
    77	- `rerender-derived-state` - Subscribe to derived booleans, not raw values
    78	- `rerender-derived-state-no-effect` - Derive state during render, not effects
    79	- `rerender-functional-setstate` - Use functional setState for stable callbacks
    80	- `rerender-lazy-state-init` - Pass function to useState for expensive values
    81	- `rerender-simple-expression-in-memo` - Avoid memo for simple primitives
    82	- `rerender-move-effect-to-event` - Put interaction logic in event handlers
    83	- `rerender-transitions` - Use startTransition for non-urgent updates
    84	- `rerender-use-ref-transient-values` - Use refs for transient frequent values
    85	
    86	### 6. Rendering Performance (MEDIUM)
    87	
    88	- `rendering-animate-svg-wrapper` - Animate div wrapper, not SVG element
    89	- `rendering-content-visibility` - Use content-visibility for long lists
    90	- `rende

    16	const TRUNCATE_THRESHOLD = 10

    19	  state: SerializedEditorState,
    20	  max: number,
    21	): SerializedEditorState {
    22	  return {
    23	    ...state,
    24	    root: {

    37	export function NestedDocEditDecorator({
    38	  nodeKey,
    39	  contentEditor,
    40	  contentState,
    41	}: NestedDocEditDecoratorProps) {
    42	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    43	  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    44	  const renderContent = useNestedContentRenderer()
    45	  const [collapsed, setCollapsed] = useState(true)
    46	
    47	  const needsTruncation = contentState.root.children.length > TRUNCATE_THRESHOLD
    48	
    49	  const truncatedState = useMemo(() => {
    50	    if (!needsTruncation) return contentState
    51	    return truncateState(contentState, TRUNCATE_THRESHOLD)
    52	  }, [contentState, needsTruncation])
    53	
    54	  const displayState =
    55	    collapsed && needsTruncation ? truncatedState : contentState
    56	
    57	  const handleOpenDialog = useCallback(async () => {
    58	    const { presentDialog } = await import('@haklex/rich-editor-ui')
    59	
    60	    presentDialog({
    61	      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
    62	        <NestedDocDialogContent
    63	          contentEditor={contentEditor}
    64	          onDismiss={() => {
    65	            const newState = contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON()
    66	            editor.update(() => {
    67	              const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    68	              if ($isNestedDocNode(node)) {
    69	                node.setContentState(newState)
    70	              }
    71	            })

    73	          }}
    74	        />
    75	      ),
    76	      theme: colorScheme,

    79	    })
    80	  }, [contentEditor, editor, nodeKey, colorScheme])
    81	
    82	  const handleToggle = useCallback(
    83	    (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    84	      e.stopPropagation()
    85	      setCollapsed((prev) => !prev)
    86	    },
    87	    [],
    88	  )
    89	
    90	  return (
    91	    // eslint-disable-next-line jsx-a11y/click-events-have-key-events, jsx-a11y/no-static-element-interactions
    92	    <div onClick={handleOpenDialog}>
    93	      <div className="rich-nested-doc-content" data-expanded={!collapsed}>
    94	        {renderContent(displayState)}
    95	      </div>
    96	      {needsTruncation && (
    97	        <div className="rich-nested-doc-mask" data-expanded={!collapsed}>
    98	          <button
    99	            type="button"
   100	            className="rich-nested-doc-toggle"
   101	            onClick={handleToggle}
   102	          >

   104	          </button>

    28	function ExitBlockPlugin({
    29	  parentEditor,
    30	  nodeKey,
    31	}: {
    32	  parentEditor: LexicalEditor
    33	  nodeKey: string
    34	}) {
    35	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    36	
    37	  useEffect(() => {
    38	    const focusParent = () => {
    39	      parentEditor.focus(() => {
    40	        parentEditor.update(() => {
    41	          const alertNode = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    42	          if (alertNode) {
    43	            const next = alertNode.getNextSibling()
    44	            if (next) {
    45	              next.selectStart()
    46	            }
    47	          }
    48	        })
    49	      })
    50	    }
    51	
    52	    const exitAlert = (removeEmpty: boolean) => {
    53	      const root = $getRoot()
    54	      const lastChild = root.getLastChild()
    55	      const shouldRemoveAlert = removeEmpty && root.getChildrenSize() <= 1
    56	
    57	      if (removeEmpty && lastChild) {
    58	        lastChild.remove()
    59	      }
    60	
    61	      if (shouldRemoveAlert) {
    62	        parentEditor.update(
    63	          () => {

    65	            if (alertNode) {
    66	              const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()

    68	              alertNode.remove()

     5	
     6	const TRUNCATE_THRESHOLD = 10
     7	
     8	interface NestedDocStaticDecoratorProps {
     9	  contentState: SerializedEditorState
    10	}
    11	
    12	function truncateState(
    13	  state: SerializedEditorState,
    14	  max: number,
    15	): SerializedEditorState {
    16	  return {
    17	    ...state,
    18	    root: {
    19	      ...state.root,
    20	      children: state.root.children.slice(0, max),
    21	    },
    22	  }
    23	}
    24	
    25	export function NestedDocStaticDecorator({
    26	  contentState,
    27	}: NestedDocStaticDecoratorProps) {
    28	  const renderContent = useNestedContentRenderer()
    29	  const [collapsed, setCollapsed] = useState(true)
    30	
    31	  const needsTruncation = contentState.root.children.length > TRUNCATE_THRESHOLD
    32	
    33	  const truncatedState = useMemo(() => {
    34	    if (!needsTruncation) return contentState
    35	    return truncateState(contentState, TRUNCATE_THRESHOLD)
    36	  }, [contentState, needsTruncation])
    37	
    38	  const displayState = collapsed && needsTruncation ? truncatedState : contentState
    39	
    40	  return (
    41	    <>
    42	      <div className="rich-nested-doc-content" data-expanded={!collapsed}>
    43	        {renderContent(displayState)}
    44	      </div>
    45	      {needsTruncation && (
    46	        <div className="rich-nested-doc-mask" data-expanded={!collapsed}>
    47	          <button
    48	            type="button"
    49	            className="rich-nested-doc-toggle"
    50	            onClick={() => setCollapsed((prev) => !prev)}
    51	          >
    52	            {collapsed ? 'Expand' : 'Collapse'}
    53	          </button>
    54	        </div>
    55	      )}
    56	    </>
    57	  )
    58	}

     1	import type { FC, ReactNode } from 'react'

     3	export interface DialogStackItemProps {
     4	  title?: ReactNode
     5	  description?: ReactNode
     6	  content: FC<{ dismiss: () => void }>
     7	  className?: string
     8	  portalClassName?: string
     9	  theme?: 'light' | 'dark'
    10	  showCloseButton?: boolean
    11	  clickOutsideToDismiss?: boolean
    12	}
    13	
    14	export interface DialogStackItem extends DialogStackItemProps {
    15	  id: string
    16	  open: boolean
    17	}
    18	
    19	let stack: DialogStackItem[] = []
    20	let idCounter = 0
    21	const listeners = new Set<() => void>()
    22	
    23	function emit() {
    24	  for (const fn of listeners) fn()
    25	}
    26	
    27	export function subscribe(fn: () => void) {
    28	  listeners.add(fn)
    29	  return () => {
    30	    listeners.delete(fn)
    31	  }
    32	}
    33	
    34	export function getSnapshot(): DialogStackItem[] {
    35	  return stack
    36	}
    37	
    38	export function presentDialog(props: DialogStackItemProps): () => void {
    39	  const id = `dialog-${++idCounter}`
    40	  stack = [...stack, { ...props, id, open: true }]
    41	  emit()
    42	  return () => dismissDialog(id)
    43	}
    44	
    45	export function removeDialog(id: string) {
    46	  stack = stack.filter((item) => item.id !== id)
    47	  emit()
    48	}
    49	
    50	export function dismissDialog(id: string) {
    51	  stack = stack.map((item) =>
    52	    item.id === id ? { ...item, open: false } : item,
    53	  )
    54	  emit()
    55	}
    56	
    57	export function dismissTopDialog() {
    58	  for (let i = stack.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    59	    if (stack[i].open) {
    60	      dismissDialog(stack[i].id)
    61	      return
    62	    }
    63	  }
    64	}
    65	
    66	export function dismissAllDialogs() {
    67	  stack = stack.map((item) => ({ ...item, open: false }))
    68	  emit()
    69	}

     1	# @haklex/rich-editor-ui
     2	
     3	基于 @base-ui/react 的无头 UI 组件，用于富文本编辑器。
     4	
     5	## 安装
     6	
     7	```bash
     8	pnpm add @haklex/rich-editor-ui
     9	```
    10	
    11	## 组件
    12	
    13	### Dialog
    14	
    15	```tsx

    17	
    18	// 声明式

    20	  <Dialog.Trigger>打开</Dialog.Trigger>
    21	  <Dialog.Portal>
    22	    <Dialog.Backdrop />
    23	    <Dialog.Popup>
    24	      <Dialog.Header>
    25	        <Dialog.Title>标题</Dialog.Title>
    26	      </Dialog.Header>
    27	      <Dialog.Description>内容</Dialog.Description>
    28	      <Dialog.Footer>
    29	        <Dialog.Close>关闭</Dialog.Close>
    30	      </Dialog.Footer>
    31	    </Dialog.Popup>
    32	  </Dialog.Portal>
    33	</Dialog.Root>
    34	
    35	// 命令式
    36	const result = await presentDialog({
    37	  title: '确认',
    38	  content: <MyForm />,
    39	})
    40	```

   532	
   533	export function NestedDocEditDecorator({
   534	  nodeKey,
   535	  contentEditor,
   536	  contentState,
   537	}: NestedDocEditDecoratorProps) {
   538	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   539	  const renderContent = useNestedContentRenderer()
   540	  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false)
   541	
   542	  const needsTruncation =
   543	    (contentState.root?.children?.length ?? 0) > MAX_PREVIEW_NODES
   544	  const previewState = useMemo(
   545	    () =>
   546	      needsTruncation
   547	        ? truncateState(contentState, MAX_PREVIEW_NODES)
   548	        : contentState,
   549	    [contentState, needsTruncation],
   550	  )
   551	
   552	  const handleToggle = useCallback(() => {
   553	    setExpanded((prev) => !prev)
   554	  }, [])
   555	
   556	  const handleEdit = useCallback(() => {
   557	    presentDialog({
   558	      title: 'Edit Nested Document',
   559	      content: <NestedDocEditorDialog contentEditor={contentEditor} />,
   560	      onClose: () => {
   561	        // Sync editor state back to node
   562	        const newState = contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON()
   563	        editor.update(() => {
   564	          const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
   565	          if ($isNestedDocNode(node)) {
   566	            node.setContentState(newState)
   567	          }
   568	        })
   569	      },
   570	    })
   571	  }, [contentEditor, editor, nodeKey])
   572	
   573	  const displayState = expanded ? contentState : previewState
   574	
   575	  return (
   576	    <>
   577	      <div
   578	        className="rich-nested-doc-content"
   579	        data-expanded={expanded}
   580	        onClick={handleEdit}
   581	        role="button"
   582	        tabIndex={0}
   583	      >
   584	        {renderContent(displayState)}
   585	      </div>
   586	      {(needsTruncation || expanded) && (
   587	        <div className="rich-nested-doc-mask" data-expanded={expanded}>
   588	          <button
   589	            type="button"
   590	            className="rich-nested-doc-toggle"
   591	            onClick={(e) => {
   592	              e.stopPropagation()
   593	              handleToggle()
   594	            }}
   595	          >
   596	            {expanded ? 'Collapse' : 'Expand'}
   597	          </button>
   598	        </div>
   599	      )}
   600	    </>
   601	  )
   602	}
   603	```

     3	  PortalThemeProvider,

     8	import {
     9	  createElement,
    10	  useCallback,
    11	  useEffect,
    12	  useSyncExternalStore,
    13	} from 'react'
    14	
    15	import type { DialogStackItem } from './store'
    16	import { dismissDialog, getSnapshot, removeDialog, subscribe } from './store'
    17	import * as css from './styles.css'
    18	
    19	const CloseIcon: FC = () => <X />
    20	
    21	const DialogStackEntry: FC<{
    22	  item: DialogStackItem
    23	  index: number
    24	}> = ({ item, index }) => {
    25	  const {
    26	    id,
    27	    open,
    28	    title,
    29	    description,
    30	    content,
    31	    className,
    32	    portalClassName,
    33	    theme = 'light',
    34	    showCloseButton = true,
    35	    clickOutsideToDismiss = true,
    36	  } = item
    37	
    38	  const dismiss = useCallback(() => dismissDialog(id), [id])
    39	
    40	  useEffect(() => {
    41	    if (!open) {
    42	      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    43	        removeDialog(id)
    44	      }, 150)
    45	      return () => clearTimeout(timer)
    46	    }
    47	  }, [open, id])
    48	
    49	  const zIndex = 50 + index
    50	
    51	  return (
    52	    <DialogPrimitive.Root
    53	      open={open}
    54	      disablePointerDismissal={!clickOutsideToDismiss}
    55	      onOpenChange={(open) => {
    56	        if (!open) dismiss()
    57	      }}
    58	    >
    59	      <DialogPrimitive.Portal>
    60	        <PortalThemeProvider className={portalClassName ?? ''} theme={theme}>
    61	          <PortalThemeWrapper>
    62	            <DialogPrimitive.Backdrop
    63	              className={css.backdrop}
    64	              style={{ zIndex }}
    65	            />
    66	            <DialogPrimitive.Popup
    67	              data-theme={theme}
    68	              suppressHydrationWarning
    69	              className={`${css.popup}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
    70	              style={{ zIndex: zIndex + 1 }}
    71	            >
    72	              {(title || description) && (
    73	                <div className={css.header}>
    74	                  {title && (
    75	                    <DialogPrimitive.Title className={css.title}>
    76	                      {title}
    77	                    </DialogPrimitive.Title>
    78	                  )}
    79	                  {description && (
    80	                    <DialogPrimitive.Description className={css.description}>
    81	                      {description}
    82	                    </DialogPrimitive.Description>
    83	                  )}
    84	                </div>
    85	              )}
    86	              {createElement(content, { dismiss })}
    87	              {showCloseButton && (
    88	                <DialogPrimitive.Close className={css.closeButton}>
    89	                  <CloseIcon />
    90	                </DialogPrimitive.Close>
    91	              )}
    92	            </DialogPrimitive.Popup>
    93	          </PortalThemeWrapper>
    94	        </PortalThemeProvider>
    95	      </DialogPrimitive.Portal>
    96	    </DialogPrimitive.Root>
    97	  )
    98	}
    99	
   100	export const DialogStackProvider: FC<PropsWithChildren> = ({ children }) => {
   101	  const stack = useSyncExternalStore(subscribe, getSnapshot, getSnapshot)
   102	
   103	  return (
   104	    <>
   105	      {children}
   106	      {stack.map((item, index) => (
   107	        <DialogStackEntry key={item.id} item={item} index={index} />
   108	      ))}
   109	    </>
   110	  )
   111	}

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-03-06 15:05:55Z)**_

I’ve narrowed this to a few concrete issues, with the biggest one around dialog close paths skipping state sync. I’m validating that against the dialog stack implementation now, then I’ll send a severity-ordered review with exact line references and any assumptions.

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-03-06 15:06:38Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Reviewing state sync and dialog close risks**
</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-03-06 15:06:52Z)**_

Using `vercel-react-best-practices` skill for this React code review.

**Findings**
1. High: dialog close paths can bypass node state sync, causing stale preview and inconsistent data flow. Sync only happens in the `Done` handler at [NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L64](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L64)-[NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L73](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L73), but dialog can still close through `onOpenChange` at [stack.tsx#L55](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor-ui/src/components/dialog/stack.tsx#L55)-[stack.tsx#L57](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor-ui/src/components/dialog/stack.tsx#L57) (e.g. escape/programmatic dismiss). `clickOutsideToDismiss: false` only covers pointer dismissal ([stack.tsx#L54](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor-ui/src/components/dialog/stack.tsx#L54)).

2. Medium: accessibility regression from clickable non-interactive container with lint suppression. The root click target is a plain `div` with `onClick` and disabled a11y rules at [NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L91](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L91)-[NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L92](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L92), so keyboard users cannot trigger edit affordance.

3. Medium: missing `editor.isEditable()` guard for interactive actions. `handleOpenDialog`/toggle are always active ([NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L57](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L57), [NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L82](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L82), [NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L92](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L92)), unlike other decorators that gate edit actions (example: [BannerEditDecorator.tsx#L29](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/BannerEditDecorator.tsx#L29)).

4. Low: `handleOpenDialog` has no import/error/reentry guard. The async dynamic import at [NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L57](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L57)-[NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L60](<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/NestedDocEditDecorator.tsx#L60) can produce duplicate dialogs on rapid clicks and unhandled rejection if module load fails.

**Notes**
- Imports in this file are otherwise correct (no obvious missing/unused imports).
- Review is static; I did not run lint/tests in this pass.
